description.overview: Iceland's only native dog, this cheerful spitz-type breed is friendly and playful. They're excellent family companions with a love for their people.
description.history: The Icelandic Sheepdog originated in Iceland.
description.temperament: Known for being cheerful, friendly, inquisitive.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their double coat, long or short coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Iceland's only native dog, this cheerful spitz-type breed is friendly and playful. They're excellent family companions with a love for their people.
